# Plants make food for us

## Short Teaching Summary
Plants make food for us: Every item in a grocery store links back to photosynthesis. Key detail: Every item in the grocery store links back to photosynthesis. Map connection: this idea links by analogy_for to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
